revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23984597483|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:五ケ庄二子塚古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|34.918222|N|135.797867|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|architectural_styles={{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|qid=Q11268718|1=Zenpōkōenfun|2=ja|3=前方後円墳|4=ko|5=전방후원분|6=zh|7=前方後圓墳}}}} {{Confusion|Uji Futagoyama Kofun|x1=located in Yamamoto, Uji City}} {{Kofun of Japan |name = Gokashō Futagozuka Kofun |image = [[File:Gokasho Futagozuka Kofun, zenkei-2.jpg|280px]]
Kofun (front part on the right, rear circular part in the back left) |alternate_name = Uji Futagozuka Kofun | part_of = Uji Kofun Cluster |location = {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}} {{ill|Uji|en|Uji|qid=Q326956|lt=Uji|1=Uji}} Gokashō Obayashi
(Within Saifō-ji Temple grounds & Futagozuka Kofun Park) |coordinates = 34|coordinates = 55|coordinates = 5.60 |coordinates = 135|coordinates = 47|coordinates = 52.32 |omitted = JP-26 |type = {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} |length = 112m (tumulus length)
16m (front part height) |constructed = Early {{ill|6th century|en|6th century|qid=Q8090|lt=6th century|1=6th century}} |burial = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-style stone chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |buried_person = |burial goods = {{ill|Cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical haniwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|qq=}}, {{ill|figurine haniwa|ja|形象埴輪|1=Representational Haniwa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/figurine haniwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Representational Haniwa|qq=}}, and others |historic_site = Part of the national {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|qid=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan|1=Historic site}}} "Uji Kofun Cluster" |notes = Similar in type to {{ill|Imashirozuka Kofun|en|Imashirozuka Kofun|qid=Q11376795|lt=Imashirozuka Kofun|1=Imashirozuka Kofun}} (Takatsuki, Osaka Prefecture) |map = Japan Kyoto city |type = Keyhole-shaped tumulus - south-southwest |map_dot_label = Gokashō
Futagozuka Kofun |map_dot_label = left }} '''Gokashō Futagozuka Kofun''' (五ケ庄二子塚古墳), also known as '''Uji Futagozuka Kofun''' (宇治二子塚古墳), is a {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Uji|en|Uji|qid=Q326956|lt=Uji|1=Uji}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} and part of the {{ill|Uji Kofun Cluster|ja|宇治古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uji Kofun Cluster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504372|1=Uji Kofun Cluster}}. The site is Historic site as a national {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|qid=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan|1=Historic site}}}. == Overview == Located on a slight elevation along the right bank of the {{ill|Uji River|ja|宇治川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uji River|1=Uji River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11449465}} in the southeastern part of the {{ill|Kyoto Basin|ja|京都盆地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoto Basin|1=Kyoto Basin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10883263}}, this large keyhole-shaped tumulus is notable for its size, measuring approximately 112 meters in restored length, making it the largest kofun in the Uji area. The mound was constructed in three tiers and features remains of {{ill|Fukiishi|en|Fukiishi|qid=Q11621213|lt=fukiishi (paving stones)|1=Fukiishi}} and rows of {{ill|cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cylindrical haniwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|qq=}}. The kofun is surrounded by a double moat, with only part of the inner moat remaining today, extending the total length of the kofun to 218 meters when including the moats. Excavations conducted between 1987 and 1991 revealed the presence of a {{ill|yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/yokoana-style stone chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}}, though much of it has been destroyed. burial goods such as figurine haniwa and {{ill|Sue pottery|en|Sue pottery|qid=Q7634351|lt=Sue pottery|1=Sue pottery}} were also found. == Burial Chamber == The burial chamber is believed to have been a yokoana-style stone chamber, although it has been heavily damaged. Excavations revealed a large stone foundation, measuring 18 meters long, 9 meters wide, and more than 2.8 meters deep. Some large stones in the adjacent Saifō-ji Temple garden are thought to be remnants of the kofun’s stone chamber. Gokasho Futagozuka Kofun, sekishitsu-ato-2.jpg|Remains of the yokoana-style stone chamber Saiho-ji (Uji, Kyoto), teien.jpg|Large stones in Saifō-ji Temple garden == designation1 == === National Historic site === * Uji Kofun Cluster – includes Futagoyama Kofun (north and south mounds) and Futagozuka Kofun. Designated on October 15, 2018. == Related Sites == * {{ill|Imashirozuka Kofun|en|Imashirozuka Kofun|qid=Q11376795|lt=Imashirozuka Kofun|1=Imashirozuka Kofun}} in Takatsuki, Osaka Prefecture == External Links == {{Commonscat|Gokasho Futagozuka Kofun}} * {{National Historic sites Database|401|00004041|Uji Kofun Cluster}} }} {{translated page|ja|五ケ庄二子塚古墳|version=100827973|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[ja:五ケ庄二子塚古墳]] {{Commons category|Gokasho Futagozuka Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q28608905}} [[Category:History of Uji, Kyoto]] [[Category:Kofun of Kyoto prefecture]] [[Category:National historic sites in Kyoto prefecture]] [[Category:Uji Kofun Group]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]]
